---
title: "Lucy Sarah Davies"
---

## Lucy Sarah Davies

**Dates:** (1854/5-1905)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY, daughter of the Rev. John Eyre Yonge, sister of [[person:1588]Charlotte Fortescue Yonge], wife of the Rev. John Paget Davies, Rector of Twineham

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
